paper_title: LITMUS∞: SMT-Verified Memory Model Portability Checking for Cross-Architecture Concurrent Code

paper_claims.claim: 14 litmus patterns × 10 architectures = 140 pattern-model pairs with DPLL-generated proof certificates
140/140 certificates pass all 4 validation levels (structural, rule validity, premise resolution, SMT re-verification)
107 UNSAT proofs + 33 SAT witnesses across the 140 pairs
Compositional false positive rate: 10.5% overall (Wilson CI [4.9%, 21.1%])
Owicki-Gries interference freedom: 5/6 test programs verified interference-free
Overapproximation bound: at most 2^|V_relaxed| - 1 false positives per analysis
paper_claims.evidence: docs/tool_paper.tex Theorem 3 (Overapproximation Bound) with formal proof

paper_claims.claim: 205-snippet adversarial benchmark across 8 categories for LLM evaluation
Structured tool comparison with herd7, Dartagnan, GenMC, CDSChecker, RCMC

honesty_notes.pattern_level_scope: 14 patterns (not 140 arbitrary programs). Cannot discover novel bugs or verify whole programs.
honesty_notes.proof_certificates: DPLL-generated certificates for small litmus formulas (<15 variables). Not industrial-scale SMT proofs.
honesty_notes.compositional_fp_rate: 10.5% false positive rate on 57 analyses. FPs concentrated in flag_sharing (33%) and counter_sharing (50%) categories.
honesty_notes.owicki_gries: Theorem assumes disjoint-variable base case extended with interference freedom. Shared-variable compositionality is overapproximate.
honesty_notes.llm_evaluation: 205-snippet benchmark defined; power analysis shows n=205 insufficient for per-category 15% CI width (need n≥171 per category).
honesty_notes.gpu_models: GPU memory models (PTX, OpenCL, Vulkan) are specification-based, not hardware-tested.
honesty_notes.fence_costs: Analytical weight reductions, not measured hardware latencies.
honesty_notes.sat_encoding: SAT encoding captures ordering constraints as Boolean formulas. Sound for litmus-test-scale programs.

reproduction_instructions.compile_paper: cd docs && pdflatex tool_paper.tex && pdflatex tool_paper.tex
